admin_panel.notes: The first-time setup wizard requires creating a new administrator account. The built-in 'admin' account is deactivated once you create your own admin during the wizard. Use the credentials you created during setup to log in. After a factory reset, the wizard runs again and you create a new account. Access the admin panel at http://192.168.1.1:8000 or http://router.synology.com.

ethernet.pppoe_clear_note: If Connection type shows PPPoE with credentials pre-filled, change it to 'Auto' and click Apply. No username or password is required for Belong.
steps_ipoe: Connect an Ethernet cable from the nbn connection box (or wall socket for FTTC/HFC) to the blue WAN port on the back of the RT6600ax
Power on the router and wait 2–3 minutes for it to fully boot
On a device connected to the router, open a browser and go to http://192.168.1.1:8000 or http://router.synology.com
If this is your first login, the SRM setup wizard will launch — create your administrator account username and password, then complete the wizard
Once logged in to SRM, open Network Center from the main menu
Click Internet in the left sidebar, then select the Connection tab
Under Primary Interface, check that Connection type is set to Auto — this is the correct setting for Belong nbn (IPoE/DHCP)
If Connection type is not set to Auto, select Auto from the dropdown
Click Apply to save the settings
Wait 1–2 minutes for the router to obtain an IP address from Belong — the WAN status should show as Connected

physical.wan_port_position: leftmost port on the rear panel
physical.reset_button: recessed pinhole on the rear panel

factory_reset.method: Use a paperclip to press and hold the RESET button on the rear panel for 10 seconds until the LED turns orange, then release. The router will wipe all settings and reinstall SRM. Wait for the LED to blink green before accessing the setup wizard.
factory_reset.notes: Factory reset (10-second hard reset) wipes all configuration and reinstalls SRM — you must run the setup wizard again to create a new admin account. A 4-second soft reset only resets admin credentials without wiping settings.

setup.setup_notes: The RT6600ax runs SRM (Synology Router Manager), a web-based OS similar to Synology's NAS software. Belong uses IPoE/DHCP — no username, password, or VLAN required. The 'Auto' connection type handles this automatically. The 2.5GbE port (LAN 1) can be reconfigured as a second WAN port via SRM for dual-WAN setups, but this is not needed for standard Belong connections — use the dedicated blue WAN port.

setup_confidence.notes: Admin panel IP (192.168.1.1:8000) confirmed via mariushosting and setup wizard documentation. WAN nav path (Network Center > Internet > Connection) confirmed via Synology KB. IPoE label ('Auto') confirmed via Synology KB internet_connection page. Credential_type (user_created) confirmed — setup wizard forces new account creation and deactivates default admin. Physical port layout (blue WAN port, leftmost) confirmed via StorageReview hardware review. Factory reset procedure (4s soft / 10s hard) confirmed via Synology KB. Firmware path (Control Panel > System > Update & Restore) confirmed via mariushosting. Deducted 10 points: SRM user guide PDF was inaccessible as binary — nav paths sourced from KB articles and community rather than verified against PDF manual.
